problem id: 45da0a33
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  00001100 -> 11000011
  10100110 -> 01001001
  11111101 -> 11101111
  10011011 -> 10010110
  10000011 -> 00010000
  11010000 -> 00110100
  11001000 -> 10110010
  11101110 -> 11011011
  10001101 -> 11110011

query: 11001100
predicted answer: 11110011
